description: Research FEMA's disaster database (fema.gov) for 'Fire' incidents in California to identify the 3 most recent 'Major Disaster' declarations. Save the disaster details (disaster_number, title, declaration_date, and incident_period) to ~/Documents/california_fire_history.json. Download one official PDF document from the most recent disaster's detail page to ~/Downloads/ and create a Firefox bookmark folder named 'FEMA Research' containing the search results page and the specific disaster detail page.
